input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON, but those require separate hoplite-* format modules and are not necessary for meaningful hoplite-core coverage.
Version 3.0.0.RC1 bumps Kotlin dependencies from the 2.9.0 line, so local Gradle and Native Image verification may still expose metadata issues unrelated to test setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is usable without external services or optional parser modules: the resolved artifact only brings Kotlin reflection/stdlib 2.1.0 and kotlinx-coroutines dependencies, and core includes MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, default decoders, and the built-in .props/.properties parser.
